description: ระบบวิเคราะห์เว็บแบบ self-hosted ที่เน้นความเป็นส่วนตัว

epics.title: ตั้งค่าโปรเจคและ Infrastructure
epics.description: สร้างโครงสร้าง Monorepo, สภาพแวดล้อม Docker

features.title: Monorepo initialization with pnpm workspaces
features.description: Setup phantom-analytics/ root with packages/tracker, packages/api, packages/dashboard, packages/shared
acceptance_criteria: Each package has its own tsconfig.json
features.checkpoint: Run `pnpm -r build` succeeds with no errors

features.title: Docker Compose full stack environment
features.description: docker-compose.yml with services: api, dashboard, postgres (+ timescaledb), redis, nginx
acceptance_criteria: `docker compose up` brings all services online
API accessible via nginx on port 80/443
features.checkpoint: `docker compose up -d && docker compose ps` shows all healthy

features.title: PostgreSQL + TimescaleDB schema initialization
features.description: init.sql with all tables: sites, events (hypertable), sessions, pageviews, funnels, funnel_events. Continuous aggregates for hourly/daily rollups.
acceptance_criteria: All 6 tables created on first boot
events table is a TimescaleDB hypertable
features.checkpoint: `\dt` in psql shows all tables; `SELECT * FROM timescaledb_information.hypertables` shows events

features.title: ESLint, Prettier, Husky pre-commit setup
features.description: Shared ESLint config, Prettier formatting, husky pre-commit running lint-staged
features.checkpoint: Intentional lint error is caught on commit attempt

epics.title: Tracker Script (tracker.js)
epics.description: JavaScript ขนาดเล็กฝั่ง client ที่ฝังในเว็บไซต์

features.title: Core tracker bundle setup
features.description: TypeScript source in packages/tracker, built with tsup to IIFE < 5KB gzip
acceptance_criteria: Works as both ESM import and <script> tag
features.checkpoint: Built file size verified with `gzip -c dist/tracker.min.js | wc -c`

features.title: Pageview auto-capture
features.description: Automatically fires pageview event on page load with url, referrer, title, timestamp
acceptance_criteria: Captures: url, referrer, title, screen size, language, timezone
features.checkpoint: Open browser with script → Network tab shows POST to /api/collect with correct payload

features.title: SPA history API patching
features.description: Patch pushState and replaceState to fire pageview on client-side navigation
acceptance_criteria: Works with React Router, Next.js App Router, Nuxt
Does not double-fire on hard reload
features.checkpoint: Navigate between pages in a Next.js demo app → each route change logs a pageview event

features.title: Fingerprint-based session ID
features.description: Generate stable anonymous session ID from screen resolution + UA + language + timezone hash (no cookies)
acceptance_criteria: Same browser/device produces same fingerprint within session
features.checkpoint: Two pageviews from same browser share session_id; incognito produces different session_id

features.title: Exit / unload event via sendBeacon
features.description: Fire session_end event with time_on_page when user navigates away
acceptance_criteria: Uses navigator.sendBeacon for reliability on unload
Captures total time on page in seconds
features.checkpoint: Close tab → network log shows beacon POST with time_on_page > 0

features.title: Custom event tracking API
features.description: Expose `phantom.track(event_name, properties)` for manual event capture
acceptance_criteria: Queues events if network unavailable, retries on reconnect
features.checkpoint: `phantom.track('signup', { plan: 'pro' })` appears in events table

features.title: DNT (Do Not Track) respect
features.description: Check navigator.doNotTrack and silently abort all tracking if enabled
acceptance_criteria: DNT=1 header detected → zero events sent
No console errors when DNT active
features.checkpoint: Enable DNT in browser → no network requests from tracker

epics.title: Event Collection API
epics.description: Fastify backend endpoint ที่รับ, ตรวจสอบ, เพิ่มข้อมูล และเก็บ events

features.title: Fastify API scaffold with Zod validation
features.description: packages/api setup with Fastify 4, @fastify/type-provider-zod, Prisma ORM connected to PostgreSQL
features.checkpoint: `curl http://localhost:3001/health` returns `{"status":"ok"}`

features.title: POST /api/collect endpoint
features.description: Main event ingestion endpoint accepting pageview, event, session_start, session_end, funnel_step types
acceptance_criteria: Validates site_id token against sites table
Validates event type and required fields per type
Returns 400 with error details on invalid payload
features.checkpoint: POST valid payload → 202; POST invalid → 400 with zod error details

features.title: GeoIP enrichment
features.description: Enrich incoming events with country, region from IP using local MaxMind DB (no external API call)
acceptance_criteria: IP resolved to country ISO code and region
Local GeoLite2 DB bundled (no API key required)
Falls back gracefully if IP unresolvable
features.checkpoint: Event from known IP shows correct country_code in database

features.title: User-Agent parsing (device/browser/OS)
features.description: Parse UA string to extract device type, browser name/version, OS name/version
acceptance_criteria: Correctly identifies mobile vs desktop vs tablet
Identifies top browsers: Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge
Identifies top OS: Windows, macOS, iOS, Android, Linux
features.checkpoint: Events table shows correct device/browser/os columns

features.title: Bot filtering
features.description: Reject events from known bots, crawlers, headless browsers
acceptance_criteria: Googlebot, Bingbot, and common crawlers are silently rejected (return 200 but not stored)
Headless Chrome detected via UA heuristics
features.checkpoint: Send request with `User-Agent: Googlebot` → event NOT in database

features.title: Redis-backed rate limiting
features.description: 100 requests/minute per IP, using @fastify/rate-limit with Redis backend
acceptance_criteria: Rate limit resets correctly after window
features.checkpoint: Script sending 110 requests/min → first 100 succeed, next 10 return 429

features.title: Redis event buffer with batch writes
features.description: Buffer incoming events in Redis List, batch-insert to PostgreSQL every 1 second to reduce DB write pressure
acceptance_criteria: Events visible in DB within 2 seconds of collection
System continues buffering if PG temporarily unavailable
No event loss on buffer flush
features.checkpoint: Send 1000 events in burst → all 1000 appear in DB within 5 seconds

features.title: CORS configuration per site domain
features.description: Allow only registered site domains to send events; block others
acceptance_criteria: Only domains registered in sites table are allowed
features.checkpoint: Request from unregistered origin → CORS block in browser console

epics.title: Analytics Query API
epics.description: REST endpoints สำหรับ query ข้อมูลย้อนหลัง และ SSE สำหรับ realtime streaming

features.title: GET /api/analytics/overview
features.description: Returns KPI summary: total pageviews, unique visitors, avg session duration, bounce rate for a given date range
acceptance_criteria: Accepts site_id, from, to query params
Uses TimescaleDB continuous aggregates for speed
features.checkpoint: GET /api/analytics/overview?site_id=1&from=2024-01-01&to=2024-01-31 returns all 4 KPIs

features.title: GET /api/analytics/timeseries
features.description: Time-bucketed event counts (pageviews/visitors/sessions) for charting
acceptance_criteria: Auto-selects bucket size: 1h for <2d range, 1d for <90d, 1w for longer
Returns array of {timestamp, pageviews, visitors, sessions}
Fills zero-value buckets so chart has no gaps
features.checkpoint: Chart renders continuous line with no missing days in a 30-day range

features.title: GET /api/analytics/pages
features.description: Top pages ranked by views with visitors, bounce rate, avg time on page
acceptance_criteria: Sortable by views, visitors, bounce_rate, avg_duration
features.checkpoint: Returns top 10 pages with all metrics; sparkline has 30 data points

features.title: GET /api/analytics/sources
features.description: Referrer/source breakdown: direct, organic, referral, social, email, paid
features.checkpoint: POST from 3 different referrers → all 3 appear in correct categories

features.title: GET /api/analytics/devices
features.description: Device type, browser, and OS breakdown
features.checkpoint: Device breakdown totals add to 100%

features.title: GET /api/analytics/geo
features.description: Country and region breakdown of visitors
acceptance_criteria: Returns top 20 countries with visitor count and %
ISO country codes for flag display
features.checkpoint: Events with country_code in DB appear correctly in geo breakdown

features.title: GET /api/realtime/stream (SSE)
features.description: Server-Sent Events endpoint streaming live visitor count, active pages, recent events
acceptance_criteria: Subscribes to Redis Pub/Sub channel per site_id
features.checkpoint: `curl -N http://localhost:3001/api/realtime/stream?site_id=1` shows streaming JSON updates

features.title: GET /api/analytics/funnel/:funnel_id
features.description: Funnel step conversion rates and drop-off data for a defined funnel
acceptance_criteria: Returns each step with: total entered, completed, conversion_rate, drop_off_rate
Handles steps with zero completions gracefully
features.checkpoint: Define 3-step funnel, send test events, verify conversion rates are mathematically correct

epics.title: Dashboard Frontend
epics.description: React dashboard สำหรับแสดงผลข้อมูล analytics ทั้งหมด (UI ภาษาไทย)

features.title: React + Vite + Tailwind project scaffold
features.description: packages/dashboard with React 19, Vite 6, Tailwind CSS 4, TanStack Query, React Router
acceptance_criteria: Dark theme applied by default (UXUI.md color system)
Base layout with sidebar and main content area renders
features.checkpoint: Dashboard shell renders in browser with correct dark colors from UXUI.md

features.title: KPI strip (4 metric cards)
features.description: Pageviews, Unique Visitors, Avg Session Duration, Bounce Rate cards with trend indicator
acceptance_criteria: All 4 cards render with correct values from /api/analytics/overview
Trend arrow and % vs previous period shown
features.checkpoint: Cards show live data; % changes are correct vs manually calculated

features.title: Main trend line chart
features.description: Time-series chart with area fill, toggle between pageviews/visitors/sessions, date range picker
acceptance_criteria: Toggle pills switch metric without full reload
Tooltip shows exact values on hover
features.checkpoint: Switching date range re-fetches and re-renders chart with correct data

features.title: Real-time visitors panel
features.description: Live visitor count with pulsing indicator, active pages list, recent events stream
acceptance_criteria: Visitor count updates every 2s without flicker
features.checkpoint: Open two browser tabs → realtime panel shows 2 active visitors

features.title: Top pages table
features.description: Sortable table of top pages with views, visitors, bounce rate, sparkline
acceptance_criteria: Click row → opens page detail side-panel
features.checkpoint: Sort by bounce rate → order changes; sparkline renders for each row

features.title: Source breakdown donut chart
features.description: Traffic source distribution as donut chart with legend
acceptance_criteria: Click segment filters all other charts
features.checkpoint: Click 'organic' segment → top pages table filters to organic traffic only

features.title: Funnel visualization
features.description: Horizontal funnel chart showing step conversion and drop-off
acceptance_criteria: Bars narrow proportionally to conversion rate
Color transitions from blue to amber as funnel narrows
Funnel selector dropdown if multiple funnels defined
features.checkpoint: 3-step funnel with 100→60→30 users shows 60% and 50% conversion rates correctly

features.title: Device & browser breakdown
features.description: Device type (pie), browser (bar chart), OS (bar chart) panels
acceptance_criteria: Three charts render on Devices tab
features.checkpoint: Devices page shows correct breakdown matching data in DB

features.title: Onboarding empty state + snippet copy
features.description: When no data exists, show getting-started screen with copyable embed snippet
acceptance_criteria: Shown when site has zero events
Snippet is correct and auto-populated with site_id
Auto-transitions to dashboard when first event arrives (SSE trigger)
features.checkpoint: New site → onboarding shown; paste snippet, open test page → dashboard auto-transitions

epics.title: จัดการหลายเว็บไซต์
epics.description: ลงทะเบียนและจัดการหลายเว็บไซต์จาก backend เดียว

features.title: Sites CRUD API
features.description: POST /api/sites, GET /api/sites, DELETE /api/sites/:id with API token generation
acceptance_criteria: Create site returns unique site_id and tracking_token
features.checkpoint: POST /api/sites creates site; tracker script with token correctly associates events to site

features.title: Site switcher in dashboard
features.description: Dropdown to switch between registered sites; all charts update to selected site data
acceptance_criteria: Switching site updates URL param and refetches all data
features.checkpoint: Add 2 sites with different events → switching shows different data for each

epics.title: เซสชันและเส้นทางผู้ใช้
epics.description: ติดตามเซสชันแบบ anonymous และแสดงเส้นทางการเข้าชมทีละหน้า

features.title: Session aggregation pipeline
features.description: Background job that stitches events into sessions: entry page, exit page, duration, page count
acceptance_criteria: Sessions table populated within 5 min of events
features.checkpoint: 5 events from one fingerprint → 1 session record with correct entry/exit pages

features.title: Journey view in dashboard
features.description: Visual timeline of page sequence for a session; entry/exit page highlights
acceptance_criteria: Shows page sequence as horizontal flow
Entry page marked in blue, exit page in amber
features.checkpoint: Click on a session in the sessions list → journey timeline renders with correct page order

epics.title: จัดการช่องทาง (Funnel)
epics.description: สร้างและจัดการ funnel หลายขั้นตอนสำหรับวัด conversion

features.title: Funnel builder API
features.description: POST /api/funnels to define a funnel with ordered steps (page URL or event name)
acceptance_criteria: Each step is either a page_url match or custom event_name
features.checkpoint: Create funnel, send matching events, verify conversion data appears in analytics endpoint

features.title: Funnel builder UI
features.description: Drag-and-drop funnel step editor in dashboard
acceptance_criteria: Save triggers API call and redirects to funnel chart
features.checkpoint: Build 3-step funnel in UI → funnel chart renders with real data

epics.title: ความปลอดภัยและการยืนยันตัวตน
epics.description: ความปลอดภัย API, จัดการ token, basic auth สำหรับ dashboard

features.title: Dashboard basic authentication
features.description: Simple username/password login for dashboard access (env-var configured)
acceptance_criteria: Login screen shown to unauthenticated users
Credentials set via DASHBOARD_USER and DASHBOARD_PASS env vars
features.checkpoint: Access dashboard URL without login → redirected to login page

features.title: API token validation
features.description: Validate tracking token on all /api/collect requests against sites table
acceptance_criteria: Token checked on every collection request
features.checkpoint: POST /api/collect with invalid token → 401; valid token → 202

epics.title: การทดสอบและคุณภาพ
epics.description: ครอบคลุม unit test, integration test และ E2E test

features.title: API integration tests (Vitest)
features.description: Tests for all /api/collect and /api/analytics endpoints with test DB
features.checkpoint: `pnpm test` passes with > 80% coverage report

features.title: Tracker unit tests
features.description: Unit tests for fingerprinting, event capture, beacon send
acceptance_criteria: Fingerprint is deterministic in test environment
features.checkpoint: `pnpm --filter tracker test` all pass

features.title: Dashboard E2E tests (Playwright)
features.description: E2E tests for critical paths: login, view dashboard, real-time update, funnel creation
acceptance_criteria: Real-time counter changes when new event arrives
features.checkpoint: `pnpm e2e` all tests pass against local Docker stack

epics.title: UI Overhaul & UX Improvements
epics.description: Modal popup ทุก action, cursor pointer, SweetAlert2, select styling, timezone selector

features.title: Modal popup for all CRUD actions
features.description: ทุก create/edit/delete/confirm ใช้ modal popup — FormModal component + ConfirmDialog
acceptance_criteria: ไม่มี inline form editing เหลือ
ทุก action เปิด modal
Escape key ปิด modal ได้
features.checkpoint: ทุกหน้าที่มี create/edit/delete ใช้ modal popup

features.title: SweetAlert2 toast notifications
features.description: แทนที่ alert() + inline feedback ด้วย SweetAlert2 toast ทั้งระบบ
acceptance_criteria: ทุก action สำเร็จ/ล้มเหลว แจ้ง toast
Copy button แจ้ง toast
ธีมสีเข้มตรงกับ Phantom
features.checkpoint: ทดสอบ create/edit/delete/copy ทุกหน้า ได้ toast notification

features.title: Timezone selector with data sync
features.description: TopBar แสดงเวลา + เลือก timezone → ข้อมูล analytics refetch ตาม timezone
acceptance_criteria: เปลี่ยน timezone → ข้อมูลเปลี่ยนตาม
API ใช้ AT TIME ZONE ใน SQL
features.checkpoint: เปลี่ยน timezone แล้วข้อมูล analytics query ใหม่ถูกต้อง

features.title: Activity Log
features.description: ตาราง log ทุก action ของ user ในระบบ — admin only, filter + pagination
acceptance_criteria: Track ทุก CRUD + auth action
Filter ตาม user, action, entity_type, date
เฉพาะ admin เห็น
features.checkpoint: Login → ดู Activity Log → เห็น log เข้าสู่ระบบ + ทุก action

status_legend.blocked: Blocked by a dependency or issue
